analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: Source data file MOESM10 only covers Figures 1-5 (sheets: Fig 1b, Fig 1f+g, Fig 3c, Fig 3f, Fig 5a, Fig 5b, Fig 5d, Fig 5e, Fig 5g, Fig 5h, Fig 5i, Fig 5j, Fig 5l). No source data for Supplementary Figure 16c is provided. Other supplementary files (MOESM4: Clinical Data, MOESM5: Supplementary Table 2, MOESM6, MOESM7, MOESM8: Supplementary Table 4) do not contain Supp Fig 16c data either.
assumptions_made: Assumed 'Supplementary Figure 16c' refers to a figure whose source data was not included in MOESM10 (which is limited to Fig 1-5 per the data context).
